name: Ekko

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Z-Drive Resonance
passive.description_source: Innate:  Ekko's  basic attacks  on-hit and damaging  abilities apply  stacks, the third stack deals bonus magic damage. If the target was a  champion, this grants  bonus movement speed to Ekko.

effects.description: Innate - Resonance: Ekko's basic attacks on-hit and damaging abilities apply a stack of Resonance to enemies hit for 4 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 3 times. The third stack consumes them all to deal 30 : 150 (based on level) (+ 80% AP) bonus magic damage. Z-Drive Resonance deals 270% damage against monsters.
Resonance cannot affect the same target more than once every few seconds.
Innate - Stolen Time: Triggering Resonance against a champion grants Ekko 50% / 60% / 70% / 80% (based on level) bonus movement speed for 2 / 2.5 / 3 (based on level) seconds.

passive.description: Innate - Resonance: Ekko's basic attacks on-hit and damaging abilities apply a stack of Resonance to enemies hit for 4 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 3 times. The third stack consumes them all to deal 30 : 150 (based on level) (+ 80% AP) bonus magic damage. Z-Drive Resonance deals 270% damage against monsters.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Ekko's basic attacks have different animations based on how many stacks his target has.

basic_ability_1.name: Timewinder
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Ekko throws a temporal grenade that deals magic damage to enemies hit. It expands at max range or upon hitting an enemy  champion,  slowing nearby enemies.

effects.context_notes: Active: Ekko throws a temporal grenade in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit.
At 700 units or upon hitting an enemy champion, the grenade slows down for 1.
Afterwards, the grenade contracts and homes back to Ekko at an increased speed, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.
Afterwards, the grenade contracts and homes back to Ekko at an increased speed, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.description: Enemies can be hit only once per pass.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Ekko throws a temporal grenade in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spell shield will block only a single instance of damage.

basic_ability_2.name: Parallel Convergence
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Ekko's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage against a low-health target, increased based on their missing health.

effects.description: Passive: Ekko's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage equal to 3% (+ 3% per 100 AP) of the target's missing health against enemies below 30% of their maximum health. The damage has a minimum threshold of 15 and is capped at 150 against minions and monsters.

Active: Ekko creates an afterimage of himself that, after 2 seconds, bats a device to the target location and grants sight of the area for 2.5 seconds. After travelling over 1.25 seconds, the device expands into a chronosphere that lasts for 1.5 seconds and which slows enemies within by 40%.

effects.context_notes: If Ekko enters the sphere before it expires, it detonates to grant him a shield for 2 seconds and stun enemies within for 2.

effects.description: Enemies can see the indicator for Parallel Convergence 2 seconds after casting.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive: Ekko's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage equal to 3% (+ 3% per 100 AP) of the target's missing health against enemies below 30% of their maximum health. The damage has a minimum threshold of 15 and is capped at 150 against minions and monsters.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The passive will proc with the attack that triggers the final stack of Resonance if it reduces a target's health below the 30% threshold.

basic_ability_3.name: Phase Dive
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Ekko  rolls in the target direction, gaining  bonus attack range.

effects.context_notes: Active: Ekko dashes in the target direction, then empowers his next basic attack within 3 seconds to have a 0.

effects.description: Phase Dive resets Ekko's basic attack timer. Ekko can cast any of his abilities during the dash.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Ekko dashes in the target direction, then empowers his next basic attack within 3 seconds to have a 0.25-second cast time, gain 300 bonus range, cause him to blink within 125 range of the target, and deal bonus magic damage.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The dash distance can be extended to up-to 550 units when targeting across terrain.

ultimate.name: Chronobreak
ultimate.description_source: Passive:  Ekko reveals a time-delayed afterimage of himself that tracks where he was 4 seconds ago.

effects.description: Passive: Upon learning Chronobreak or if its current cooldown is lower than 4 seconds, Ekko reveals a time-delayed afterimage of himself that constantly tracks where he was 4 seconds ago.

effects.context_notes: Active: Ekko enters stasis at the start of the cast time, and afterwards heals himself and dashes to his afterimage's location at the time of cast over 0.
Active: Ekko enters stasis at the start of the cast time, and afterwards heals himself and dashes to his afterimage's location at the time of cast over 0.

effects.description: Ekko is immune to all displacements during Chronobreak.

ultimate.description: Passive: Upon learning Chronobreak or if its current cooldown is lower than 4 seconds, Ekko reveals a time-delayed afterimage of himself that constantly tracks where he was 4 seconds ago.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Ekko will attempt to basic attack the closest target after appearing at the cast location, but can do so quicker if he manually attack commands after the dash, except if Phase Dive is primed.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
